reviews.title: Not for Certain Noise
reviews.text:
Unfortunately these o-rings didn't help with the noise from my mechanical keyboard and switches. The noise from my keyboard comes from the sound the springs make when the button pops back up, and these o-rings work to muffle sound when the keys are pressed down. For keyboards with raised keys that don't bottom out, like mine, and for switches that make more noise when they come back up instead of when they go down, the o-rings are not effective for reducing noise.

Otherwise, the product is good, and I'm keeping the o-rings for when I eventually change out the switches on my keyboard entirely.

reviews.title: awesome!
reviews.text: awesome set of o-rings for the price.

reviews.title: Really nice modification for my keyboard
reviews.text: These cut down the travel and damp the clicks in my moonlander, great value.

reviews.title: Good value rings kit
reviews.text:
I was setting up two keyboards with lighter switches, and think that o-rings are important when you drop the force. This kit was a good value, and I like the brushes to clean the keyboards.

I would recommend a decent set of tweezers to push the rings down onto the key posts. I had a plastic set that was perfect for it ( they came with a pair of Moondrop IEMs ).

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Very good O-rings

title: 4-Port HDMI KVM Switch – 4K 60Hz – QHD 144Hz - Audio Output and USB Sharing – Mechanical & Gaming Keyboards Supported – HKS0401A2U
description:
This 4x1 HDMI KVM Switch allows you to share one set of “keyboard, video monitor, and mouse” (“KVM”) with up to four PC’s or video devices (Xbox, PS4, Firestick, etc). The switcher does not require software and works with Windows, MacOS, Unix/Linux, Raspberri Pi, etc. HDMI 2.0 protocol supports 4K@60hz and blazing 144hz@1440P, making this device a perfect fit for work-from-home professionals and high-end video gaming.
Key Features
- Supports DisplayPort, DVI, & VGA with approved adapters.  - Keyboard passthrough mode allows for better compatibility plus multimedia key functions  - Hotkey triggers assignable to either Scroll Lock or Right-CTRL  - USB sharing works with printers, jump drives, USB headsets and webcams for teleconferencing.  - Auto-scanning with adjustable time interval from 1 to 250 seconds.  - 1-year US-based warranty when purchased from BuyTESmart
FAQ
- Audio is transmitted via HDMI connection. HDMI or DisplayPort monitor required for audio  - Use powered USB hub to expand the USB2.0 port if multiple connections are needed  - Use USB extender to reduce distance to receiver if wireless mouse/keyboard is “jumpy”  - Please install CR2025 battery before use (battery not included)
Mouse / Keyboard Compatibility
Dedicated mouse & keyboard ports have emulation programming. Second gen chipsets have “Passthrough Mode” to send special characters such as multimedia keys (play, pause, volume up/down), which improves keyboard compatibility. Keyboard software such as Logitech Options, Corsair iCUE, etc conflicts with the emulation and limits the ability to use macro keys. We recommend using the KVM’s USB2.0 port as a workaround if this software if needed. USB2.0 port does not have emulation programming and KVM will not recognize hotkey commands. Please use a powered USB hub to expand USB connectivity.
features: Share 4 computers with 1 monitor, keyboard, mouse. Switch between PC’s with push button, keyboard hotkeys, mouse gestures, or remote control. Can also use as HDMI switch for gaming consoles and streaming devices.
HDMI 2.0 supports UHD 4K60hz (3840x2160), QHD 144hz (2560x1440), 1080P 144hz (1920x1080). Plus Ultrawide 60hz (21:9 & 32:9). HDCP 2.2, HDR10, Dolby Vision. EDID Emulation.
Plug & Play. No software or drivers needed. Supported by IT departments for work-from-home professionals. Separate your work from your personal life without the hassle & clutter!
Transmit audio to monitor via HDMI and/or external speakers via stereo output. Share USB device such as webcam and headset with dedicated USB2.0 port. Great for Zoom and Twitch users.
Supports wired, wireless, mechanical, multimedia, and gaming keyboards. No delay, zero latency keyboard switching and pass-through mode for multimedia keys. READ FAQ & PICS.
U.S. Based TECHNICAL SUPPORT from BuyTESmart available to help resolve all issues.

reviews.title: Great Keycaps for the price!!
reviews.text: When these keycaps came in I wasn't expecting a whole lot because of the price but surprisingly they're actually pretty nice. Usually on cheaper sets like this the legending and print quality can vary quite a bit but these keycaps were really consistent and is on par with some other sets I've had that cost twice as much so that was nice to see. Overall they're pretty great for the price and I honestly recommend them if you if you're looking for "designer" style keycaps.

reviews.title: Beautiful keycaps for designers!
reviews.text: These keycaps are beautiful! I use photoshop often so I already have the shortcuts memorized but having these keycaps are just so nice regardless. They feel really nice and thick, the printing on them is nice and clear, and I love the color way for them. I dont use this board often even when working in photoshop and really just use this board and keycap set as a decorative piece to add to my collection of keyboards. I love these keycaps!!

reviews.title: Decent. Kind of small coil.
reviews.text:
YUNZII AKKO Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Sakura)

This cable just ok. It's not bad but definitely lacks the quality feel of others. The coil is small around 1/2" outer diameter. The connections are good and fit in my keyboard well and the aviator cable looks good. For me, the cable from the coil to the USBc connector is a bit too long and looks kind of weird being so far away from the keyboard. Also, the coil just looks like an old phone coiled cable. It just isn't for me, but the price is good, and it doesn't look half bad.

reviews.title: Nice keys, font size a little horsey
reviews.text:
Note: I chose the Grey/Beige set. This set (YMDK 96 84 ANSI ISO Key) went on just fine, and are a great frugal find.

I bought these for an relatively inexpensive TKL mechanical wireless keyboard (RK87G) because the OEM keycaps were set in a truly fugly and illegible typeface.

These YMDKs feel good, and have a slightly deeper "thunk" when they bottom out. The two-character keys are typeset vertically, as Underwood and Remington intended. Although the font size on most of the keys is a big, they are fine and give the keyboard a bit of a homemade retro look.

NOTE Specific to the RK87G: This YMDK set does not have a ScrlLk key. The right Shift and right CTRL on this set are a little too small, so I just left the old ones on. I also left the OEM ScrlLk, Page Up, and arrow keys on because they have symbols for controlling the RGB LEDs. If you use the RKs function keys for app and control shortcuts, you may want to leave those on as well.

May 30, 2021
I've had these for a little over six months now. Still a great value set the money. I installed them on a keyboard I use for hours on end nearly every day. The printing on the beige keys hasn't faded, but I've noticed that the grey keys with white printing are beginning to fade. I'm not taking any stars off because before I purchased these I had already read other reviewers who had the same experience.

reviews.title: Good for the money
reviews.text: It didn’t give me the thoc sound that I wanted but given the price it is good enough

reviews.title: Rough surface, washed out colors
reviews.text:
These caps seems well made enough, with a rough texture that provides ample grip without having a sandpaper effect on your fingers. The colors are a fair bit less saturated than the images make them look. Slightly annoying but they're still quite nice.

Do note that this set does not come with a long shift or scroll lock cap. This isn't an issue as they'll be going on a 65% for me but if you're looking to put them on a full size board you may be disappointed.

reviews.title: Nice manual keyboard with a lighter touch.
reviews.text:
This review is for the Pwnage Ultra Custom Mechanical Keyboard: Gateron Optical Switches.

The Package was delivered quickly in perfect condition. In the box was the full-size white keyboard, detachable USB cord, keycap remover, and manual.

Setup was plug and play, no additional drivers needed for Windows 11. The keyboard replaced my 105 key Cherry Blue switch manual black keyboard... which has worked very well with just basic cleaning for 5 years. Compared to my old keyboard this keyboard adds multi color, and some very intense graphics, should you choose to use them... I see videos already posted for this product cycling thru the graphics available so I will just show pictures of the static color I have chosen.

The Red Optical/Manual switches on this keyboard are a little quieter than the blue cherry switches I am used to – but they are by no means quiet…it definitely has the tap, tap, tap sound inherent in all manual keyboards The press seems very easy... much lighter and easier than the blue manual switches I am used to. And so far, I think I prefer the red optical/manual switches on this keyboard. Of course, typing is very subjective to taste and your mileage may vary.

Overall, I can honestly say that I approve of this keyboard, and will keep this one as my everyday keyboard, unless, of course my wife steals it for her home office workstation… she has after all been eyeballing it.

reviews.title: Overall an excellent full size keyboard
reviews.text:
Unboxing was fun. Nicely packaged. Keyboard is nice and large, a little too large for my tastes coming from someone who uses a 65%. But good for every day use and office use with a little side of gaming in the evening. Switches are nice and the RGb effects are plentiful. I think being able to switch the plates easily for those who want a quick easy solution to being able to completely change their keyboard without having to spend the time and money to build a completely custom one one.

Definitely a great full size.

reviews.title: Gaming all the way, I could not use this for extended typing... loudness lol
reviews.text:
This keyboard is very well made, has good heft and stability to it. The keyboard includes a braded USB-C and a key cap remover tool. The keys feel really good when gaming, the input is instantaneous and the feel and travel is really smooth. The only downside for me it is that it is very loud. I use this when my wife is around and she is immediately annoyed, lol, so I only use it when I game on my own. That being said, this is my favorite keyboard. I love all the RGB patterns, (check video). I love the feel of the keys, when I game I feel that is just the right travel distance and feel for my taste. The rear pop out legs help me put this bad boy at the right angle. The finish is really even and dark, the keys are not your typical white on black, it is more of a clear or light grey, this makes the contrast a little harder to see what key is what, so if you don't type well and need to reference the keyboard visually it might be a harder to see. All in all this is a very good entry level keyboard and it is very budget friendly.

+ RGB Great patterns
+ Hefty and stable
+ Silky smooth keys
+ USB-C braded cable
+ Mac / Win compatible
+ Black finish is matte and clean
- Loud Keys

Hope this was helpful!

reviews.title: Beautiful Keyboard
reviews.text:
I was first impressed with this keyboard by the packaging. The flap that secures the box top it held closed by magnets. Unique and impressive.

As to the keyboard, it is beautifully white and has top-of-the-line red key actuators. With these you get a definite "click" when you hit the keys informing you the character has been chosen. The keytops supplied are also all white and they supply a keytop pulling tool, obviously expecting you to switch out some of the keytops to suit your taste, making this superior quality unit fully customized to your taste.

A premium keyboard for those who appreciate true quality in a computer input instrument.

reviews.title: Great and beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:784296779c5343262f2f9394390eabd8]] First of all, the packaging box of this keyboard caught my eye. The box was attracted by magnets, which is novelty for me. The keyboard is beautiful, I like the white keyboard because it looks very clean, and there are many kinds of RGB lights, which means that we have many options. It is very comfortable to press the keys and has a good sense of hitting. Meanwhile, the keyboard is a little louder for me. I don't feel it when I play games, but I feel a little noisy when I work, and I'm afraid it will disturb my roommates because our desktops are in the same room, but the sound is within the acceptable range. Overall, I am satisfied with this beautiful and useful keyboard.

title: ikbc W200 Wireless Mechanical Keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switch for Windows and Mac OS, Enables Media Key and LED Indicator (2.4G Dongle, USB 2.0, PBT Double Shot 87 Keycaps, Black Color, ANSI/US)
features: ▼ Mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switches (Linear): A linear, lighter but does not have tactile bump and audible click found comparing with Cherry MX Blue switches. Cherry MX Red is ideal for gaming where the low articulation force and linear path allow for quick successive key presses. Typing with Cherry MX Red switches is similar to browns, though it does lack tactile feedback and It is always the best preference for gamers.
▼ A durable computer keyboard with PBT Double Shot keycaps for Ergonomic Keycap Shapes designed to provide you with durable, long lasting and comfortable typing experience.

▼ Plug-And-Play Simplicity. : Setup takes seconds—you simply plug the wireless receiver into a USB port and start using your keyboard right away without software. 100% Anti-ghosting with 6-key Rollover and convenient FN Multimedia Shortcuts Keys.

▼ Other Features : Original Cherry MX Switch-Each Reliable Switches Rated for 50 million Typing Times. Using 2.4Ghz Wireless can Connectivity-Up to 6 Month Long Standby Time. Product structure include the Smart Power Indicator Light and 2 Adjustable Feetstand Height.
▼ What You Can Get: iKBC Cherry MX Red switch mechanical keyboard x1, 2.4G wireless dongle x1 (equipped inside battery area), AAA batteries x2, dust cover x1, key puller x1, user manual x1.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
It meets all my needs. I got it to replace a wireless Velocifire keyboard whose internal battery was dying. I had to plug my old one in everyday as I couldn’t see the key labels without the backlight, and it’s built in battery life decreased from 5 to 1 days over a couple years. So it was essentially wired, while I prefer the wireless aesthetic.

This one avoids the backlight killing the battery life as well as internal battery degradation. I can see the key labels fine without a backlight, and it takes replaceable batteries. Battery life should be months without the backlight, and it even has a low battery warning light. No cord to deal with.

Seems well built, heavy, and doesn’t slide on the desk. Nice price point. Easy to set up. It even has multiple tilt angle (height) options, although I like it flat. TKL is great to minimize the distance to reach the mouse, improving ergonomics.

I went from brown to red switches as that’s all that was in stock, and it was an easy change, although I could tell a slight difference initially.

reviews.title: Quite Loud
reviews.text:
If you can't stand the sound of a clacking keyboard, this isn't for you. It can get quite loud, especially when you're typing fairly quickly. This is probably better for techies who like the intense sound and the tactile key interface. The lighting is also nice. I can recommend this keyboard for those who either live or work alone.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: A No-Cable Classic For Writers
reviews.text:
I am not lying: This is hands down the best keyboard for writing I have used in the last twenty years. I liked the older acrylic Apple keyboard and I own a mechanical keyboard with click-switches (blue), but this one makes touch typing so much more comfortable.
I wasn’t sure if I would like the tactile keys without click, because I actually like the click. They are just very loud. Logitech’s K845 (with Cherry MX red) is a great keyboard as well, but louder and has a cable.
I wish this keyboard would be backlit though. Black keyboards in front of big screens need some sort of illumination. I got one of these USB LED lights that I plugged behind my monitor, that half-solves the problem by providing some backlight.
Still it’s awesome to write on it. It’s focus is to be a mechanical keyboard. So much that it seems that it skipped the product design. It looks like an OEM-Keyboard from 1995. That’s in a way uncompromisingly functional, but next to a modern flat butterfly keyboard it looks like someone parked an old Volvo next to a Miata.
The quality is good. The keycaps are heavy and lettering sharp. It might be confusing for some that the ‘upper’ characters are printed next to the main set in the same size.
Battery life seems not to be a problem. I am pretty much writing all day, and I’m still on the first set of batteries that came in the package.
PROS AND CONS
+ Precise keyboard for touch-typing
+ Quiet enough for shared work areas
+ Height adjustable
+ Great quality
+ Long Battery life
+ Connects via dongle, not Bluetooth (yes, for me that’s a pro. Bluetooth sucks)
+ Compact with no number pad

- Chunky design
- No backlight
- Very heavy
- Vague keycap lettering
- No number pad (*conflict*)
I can recommend this keyboard to anyone who is typing over a long amount of times. It takes a while to get used to, but once adjusted it’s less tiring than modern butterfly or rubber cap keyboards, because the keys don’t bottom out that easily, and feel better to the fingertips. I took a few photos. I hope it helps to make a decision.

reviews.title: Silent Cherry Red Switches Work Well With Family Room Computer
reviews.text:
While the cherry MX red keys are often used for gaming, I am reviewing this as a typing keyboard in a family room, where the loud clackity clack of a keyboard is unwelcome. And I find this keyboard to be a great solution for such an environment.

This keyboard paired so effortlessly with my Mac that I wasn’t even aware it happened. I checked the keys for their mapping, and found them to be as one would expect for a Windows keyboard—just the usual issue with the non-Apple standard keys near the Shift key.

It is not “full-size,” but 80% size, so it is somewhat smaller, but not so much so that you fee cramped.

They keys are as silent as advertised. And while an old-school touch typist might miss the “click” feedback of a mechanical keyboard, these keys have decent travel, so if you are typing, you will have little doubt that you have actually engaged the key. (I can’t talk to gaming with these.)

I have had no trouble with the bluetooth connection, nor the responsiveness while typing.

If I have any reliability issues, I will be sure to revisit this review as necessary.

reviews.title: Looks Good, Feels Good
reviews.text: I bought these as an alternative to replacing the whole keyboard. I have an old Das Keyboard with blank keys and cherry blue switches. With these keycaps and dampner rings these keys feel really nice. Everything fit except the space bar, which is pretty good for something thing not custom to my keyboard brand. The keycap puller has thin arms to get between the keys easily, which was nice because the one I got with the dampners was too thick. By swapping these keys out I feel like I saved myself $100 since I didn't buy a whole new keyboard.

reviews.text: I was a little hesitant to buy these keycaps because they seemed too good to be true for the price, but sometimes you take a risk and it pays off! These keys are very nicely thick and have a good texture to them, and the side printing looks good.

reviews.title: Nice, inexpensive keycaps.
reviews.text: I bought these keycaps to refresh an older mech that I'd worn the keys down to smooth nubs. Didn't expect too much for this price. They came packaged neatly, all fit quite well, and feel good under the fingers. They're a little thicker than my stock keycaps, and I had no problems like others mentioned with the spacebar. The side printing is nice for those that don't touch type, but would still like the look of a blank keyboard. I may pick up another set of these for my home keyboard.

reviews.title: ULTRA Smooth, ZERO scratch and SAVES your RGBs, what else do you want?
reviews.text: These are so smooth you wont even believe it until you put it up to your ear and will hear nothing going on on the inside of the switch. After trying the Oil Kings and being super impressed, I said fine lets try the CJ Dark Blue Lubed switch and see what the fuss is about and I am glad I did. It is the end game switch. Stop the search right here. These are dead smooth a 10 out of 10, OK are about 7-10 and the Gateron Red Pro are somewhere like 5-10. They are all hard to tell and distinguish between the smoothness but once you test them out to your ear/finger you will be able to tell. I don't believe you need to lube these because well, they come lubed and since they are so smooth I don't see a need. Also the benefit with this switch is that this CJ Dark Blue comes with a slot for the LED to shine through just fine, so you will save your RGB as I have and I am glad.

I highly recommend this cable for anyone looking for a custom looking cable that wont break the bank.

reviews.title: Works as advertised!
reviews.text: This cable worked exactly as advertised. My keyboard has a USB c connector, and it fit together perfectly. I love the look of this cable as it neatly tucks under my desk and doesn't leave any unnecessary excess hanging around. Overall very happy with this product!

reviews.title: Decent aviator cable for my keyboard setup.
reviews.text: These cables are an aesthetically great match for my “rebel scum” keyboard build.  The connections are tight and the materials used seems like they are great quality.  I don’t really have any complaints about the quality of this product.  I think it’s important to note these are not braided cables, and have a soft rubber feel, much like you would get on any standard USB type cable.

reviews.title: Good Quality!
reviews.text: Bright white coiled cable makes my desk look neater and organized. Matches my desk decor better. Keyboard response is the same as the original cable it came with, no complaints here.

The USB-C plug is about 5.5mm thick, so should fit most recessed plugs. I was able to charge every device I tried, even a chromebook (lenovo duet) and phone (pixel 6a).

reviews.title: Excellent tactile
reviews.text:
I have purchased these, lubed Glorious Panda, and Tecsee Purple panda.

This is the best with the other 2 being very close to as good as this. The tactile-ness is a little better than the other both. With the other 2, the tactile is right at the beginning, while this one starts at the beginning and seems to feel the same until bottoming out. All have the nice bump back.

I didn't lube these and they sound and feel great. I think this is my favorite tactile now. But if you're on budget, I would recommend one of the others.

reviews.title: Not a bad one in the bunch
reviews.text: Got the 90 pack and not a broken or bent pin in the entire bunch. Professionally packed and working 100 percent. All switches tested and working fine. A little expensive but worth it for the fast Amazon delivery.

reviews.title: Good quality, thick keycaps
reviews.text: Fits my case perfectly. Feels nice and looks nice.

reviews.title: Good quality and adorable!
reviews.text:
Key caps are textured, but do not feel rough. The textured PBT will keep them from getting shiny as fast (compared to smooth ABS). No print errors. Fit the Cherry switches perfectly. They feel weighty and durable. The plastic is cut cleanly, no rough edges. Nice big font, centered on each key. I am very happy with these.

The only thing I am a bit disappointed about is that the special (non-standard) Capslock key does not fit my keyboard; the slot where you are supposed to insert the switch is not centered correctly. But, it isn't enough of a disappointment for me to knock down my rating.

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.text: These keycaps are made of PBT, which is about the highest grade of plastic that you can get for your keycaps. I love the flatter profile of the XDA keycaps. The print on the keys is very classic, large, and easy to read. This keycap set contains both peach and sea green keycaps for the function keys, space bar, escape, and enter keys. You can mix and match them until your hearts delight. You even get some extra keys for media keys if your keyboard has them, plus menu and function keys. You get a wide variety of keys that will fit most Cherry MX style keyboards easily. The plastic is nice and textured so your fingers won't slip off the keycaps when you are typing on the keyboard. I would highly recommend these keycaps as an upgrade to ABS keycaps, and for customizing your keyboard in a cute vintage style.

title: nuphy Air60 Portable Wireless Keyboard, 60% Low Profile Mechanical Keyboard, Supports Bluetooth 5.0, 2.4G and Wired Connection, Compatible with Windows and Mac OS Systems-Gateron Brown Switch
features: ✨【The new upgrade】：NuType F1 is highly praised by many users. On this basis, we have upgraded NuType F1 in all aspects and got the latest Air60 low-shaft mechanical keyboard. It adopts 60% layout (64 keys), bright color scheme, and the design of low shaft will not hurt your wrist after using the keyboard for a long time. The wide keycap design can help reduce the number of keystroke errors.

💻【Three-mode design】：Each user's usage is different. Based on user needs, we try to adapt the Air60 to as many users as possible, so the Air60 keyboard supports 2.4G, Bluetooth wireless connection and type C wired connection, and can connect up to 4 equipments at the same time to meet more complex user needs.

💪【Alternative laptop keyboard】：The four foot pads on the back of the Air60 can be perfectly embedded between the keys of the notebook keyboard. Typing on the Air60 will not touch the notebook keyboard at the bottom, giving notebook users a better typing experience. It is compatible with most laptops on the market, including the latest Macbooks.

💡【60% Portable Keyboard】：Compared with Air75, Air60 has no F area and will be smaller in size. If you don’t use F area often, Air60 is undoubtedly a better choice for use on the go; if you often use a laptop, Air60 can be perfectly placed. On the keyboard of the notebook computer, it is currently suitable for the vast majority of computers on the market, especially the Mac series, and it is more convenient to carry.

🔋【2500mAh battery】：The battery size of the Air60 wireless keyboard is 2500 mAh. The laboratory test time is more than 48 hours, which can meet the needs of a week of office work. When the backlight mode is turned off, the use time can be greatly increased.

reviews.title: Works great. Battery life is pathetic
reviews.text: Keyboard works great. Compact. Keys are responsible with good travel. The battery, however, lasts just about a day, which is unacceptable.

reviews.title: Didn't think low profile could feel this good...
reviews.text:
I was hesitant to try out this keyboard because I have always avoided low profile mechanical keyboards.

Maybe because I did actually type very well and fast with the chic-lit style keyboards that this keyboard reminds me of and I am too deep into the mechanical keyboard hobby to really want to move to low profile.

I am glad I took the leap!

I really like the way the browns feel on this keyboard. It is a pleasure to type on and the space bars and other stabilized keys feel great. Out of the box I don't think there is anything you need to do to this keyboard except use it!

Some things will take getting use to like the smaller shift button. I actually wouldn't mind if this board was spread out a bit more to allow for more traditional length buttons, but I'm sure it is something I could pick up quickly.

The build quality feels excellent and the polished steel plate on the bottom is a great touch. It really looks classy and I love the look of this keyboard. Nuphy's color-ways have always been super slick to me and this is no different.

The board has awesome RGB effects that you can change easily from the board itself. It connects wired, through bluetooth, or through a 2.4ghz adapter. Bluetooth connected instantly and works super well.

It comes with a ton of accessories, from magnetic feet to tilt the board a bit to extra keycaps, pullers, switches, stickers, and the instructions are also a poster of an anime chick which would probably look good in a gamer style room.

I am really tempted to try and use this board as a daily driver but right now I'm using it with it sitting on my M1 Macbook Airs keyboard and it is working great for that use case. It is thin enough that it doesn't block the screen or anything like that.

I have another compact 60% board that has the same goals as this Nuphy board and it misses the mark. Nuphy really hit the nail on the head with this board.

These were a great price among the similar sets I found and were an affordable way to dive into my first customization. I wanted some kinda retro keys and I just love em!

title: TECWARE Phantom 87 Key Mechanical Keyboard, RGB led, Outemu Brown Switch
features: RGB BACKLIGHTING - Enhance your gaming experience with 18 pre-set configurations on the mechanical keyboard, or create a unique one to match your setup

OUTEMU SWITCHES - The gaming mechanical keyboard comes with Outemu mechanical switches for precise gaming and comfortable typing. Spare switches + keycap & switch remover tools are provided for easy replacement
FIBERGLASS PCB - Built with SMD LEDs and FR-4 fiberglass printed circuit board, this Tecware mechanical keyboard is able to withstand extended periods of intensive and hardcore gaming sessions

DOUBLE-SHOT KEYCAPS – Featuring an all-new font, the keycaps on this mechanical keyboard are double-shot ABS (dual-injection molding process) which guarantee high resistance against surface wear; markings that cannot be worn off as they are physically part of the keycaps

SPEED ADVANTAGE - With full N-key rollover and 1000Hz pooling rate, Tecware keyboards allow faster and smoother gaming experience. The depression of each key is detected individually, meaning all key presses will be registered, no matter how many keys you press down simultaneously

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: Very bright lights. Click clack noise keys. Small the way I like it. Portable. Works great. Has usb cover cap too.

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard.
reviews.text: This is my first mechanical keyboard and I really love the quality of this keyboard. The LED's are bright and on keyboard LED controls are very useful as you don't have to depend on the software. The keyboard feels very premium and on par with any other expensive keyboard. I would highly recommend this to others looking for new mechanical keyboard.

reviews.title: the smaller one with the browns... i love it
reviews.text: ok the onboard RGB stuff is really why i bought this. Its not Razer RGB but for +/- 50 bucks? oh hell yea. The keys are great, if your used to others it might take a sec to get accustomed, but if you use it your fingers will get to know it real nice :) Solid thru and thru.

reviews.title: Yes
reviews.text: Custom color mapping, might need to buy some more resistant switches for keys near my palms.. or I could learn to type properly. Either way, I approve.

reviews.title: Great colors
reviews.text: Exactly what my son wanted.  Color control is amazing.

title: EPOMAKER Airy 143 Keys ESA Profile ANSI ISO Layout Clear Shine Through Keycaps Set for Mechanical Keyboard, Compatible with MX-Clone Switches Cherry/Gateron/Kailh/Akko/Ajazz Switch(Airy Black)
features: 【EPOMAKER Airy Transparent Keycaps】EPOMAKER Airy Keycaps set is designed to fit on a standard ANSI/ISO keyboard with MX style switches. Perhaps you want to give your favorite AZERTY keyboards a makeover to match the modern design trends? Whatever your taste, we’re positive that this is the right choice for you! Shine-through RGB backlight creates an vivid atmosphere which plays an important role in play-ability and mood

【ESA Profile, Compatible with MX Switches】From the community, for the community. EPOMAKER ESA Profile is the best practice of our pursue. ESA profile has a angled and spherical top similar to SA profile. The height is medium but not too tall. It provides unique experience unlike other profiles. This profile is considered as a solid option for both gaming and quick or regular typing

【143 Keys Set, ANSI/ISO Layout Compatible】Apart from the basic full keycaps, this set also contains extra replacement keycaps, including Mac modifiers and ISO special keys, such as big Enter key, 1.25U Shift...Either you are using ANSI standard layout or you are more familiar with ISO layout, we cover it all for you. Simply get one set and meet all needs

【High-Quality Polycabonate Material with UV Printing】Pursuing an ultimate transparency, this set adopts premium PC material to mould the keycaps and printing the characters through digital printing process. The rigorous production ensures the keycaps survive *wear-resistant and scratch-resistant tests. *Note: the test result comes from the laboratory data may differ from actual usage scenes. Due to the material properties, PC keycaps may still be vulnerable to scratches and hand sweat/oil/cream

【Increased Compatibility】EPOMAKER Airy Clear keycaps set contains special shift sizes and modifiers like the 1u, 1.75u and 2u SHIFT key, so it is with more possibilities to customize your EPOMAKER keyboard, such as 60%/65%/75%/TKL/96%/1800-compact/100% keyboard. It also has split spacebar keys that you might need. A keycap set that makes your DIY journey worry-free

reviews.title: Kawaii !!
reviews.text: Comes with all the keys caps you need, love how smooth it feels. You may need to dim your keyboard brightness, found the light through the clear key caps can hurt your eyes after a while.

reviews.title: Exceptionally perfect feel EXCEPT no way to find your position!
reviews.text:
I wanted to love these key caps. They look great! They feel superb and their smooth texture is exactly what I wanted.

However, two major flaws: I didn't even know this was a thing to consider, but they don't have bumps on the positioning keys "F" and "J". So if you type a lot and remove your hands from the keys, you need to look down every time to find your position. This interrupts my workflow as a transcriptionist quite a bit. The other disadvantage is that the smooth feel of the material also makes it impossible to keep skin oil, snack residues, etc. from being left behind on these caps, making them somewhat difficult to grip after the first half hour.

reviews.title: Really nice visual upgrade
reviews.text:
I wanted to upgrade my keyboard’s appearance, and after much Googling I settled on this product. I have a full size 104 key keyboard, and looking at keycaps on various websites makes it seem kinda complicated to know which set I’d need for my specific keyboard (Das Keyboard 4). Some Ctrl keys are wider than others, Spacebars shorter than others, etc. and what I liked about this set is that it includes different length keys and you just use the one that fits your keyboard and ignore the rest.

This is my first set of keycaps so I can’t really speak with any knowledge to the quality of the keys, but I’m really happy with how they look. They feel similar to the ones that came with my keyboard but look muuuuch better.

reviews.title: Fantastic keycap set
reviews.text:
They finally arrived! I plan on putting these keycaps on a 75% keyboard that won't arrive for another couple of months so in the pictures, I only put it on part of my keyboard to test them out. I want to "preserve" that new keycap feeling later. :)

These keycaps are fairly thick and have the standard PBT texture. The doubleshot legends are quite clear and none of the spacebars are warped! This is a new profile I've never typed on and I can't find much information on the web about it so I included a lot of pictures. I compared them in the pictures to my Ducky keyboard with doubleshot ABS. They actually aren't too different from OEM keycap profile (from the Ducky) height but some of the rows are higher. They're much more shapely and the F and J keys have a deeper dish. Compared to DSA keycaps, they don't seem to be quite as deep dishey overall which I actually prefer.
The keycaps fit snug on cherry mx brown stems, more so than my Ducky keycaps. They aren't hard to put on though. Some of the stems have a small part of plastic missing from the MX cross area but it's only a handful of the keycaps and it didn't effect the fit. I've included photos of this as well.
Overall they're great keycaps that I won't be using yet until my keyboard for them arrives.
